What we do

End-to-end engineering
for ambitious teams

From idea to launch and beyond — we cover every layer of the stack so you can focus on what matters.

Web Development

Blazing-fast web applications built with React, Next.js, and modern frameworks — optimised for performance, SEO, and accessibility.

  • React
  • Next.js
  • TypeScript

Mobile Apps

Native-quality iOS and Android experiences using React Native and Flutter — one codebase, two platforms, zero compromise.

  • React Native
  • Flutter
  • iOS/Android

Cloud & DevOps

AWS, GCP, and Azure infrastructure designed for scale — CI/CD pipelines, containerisation, monitoring, and zero-downtime deploys.

  • AWS
  • Docker
  • Kubernetes

AI & Machine Learning

Integrate LLMs, build custom models, and create intelligent features that give your product an unfair advantage in the market.

  • OpenAI
  • Python
  • LangChain

Backend & APIs

Robust, scalable APIs and microservices with Node.js, Go, and Python — architected for reliability and built to grow with you.

  • Node.js
  • Go
  • PostgreSQL

Technical Consulting

Architecture reviews, technology audits, and team augmentation. We help you make the right decisions before they become expensive ones.

  • Architecture
  • Audits
  • Strategy

const intercode = {
  mission: "Build what matters",
  values: [
    "Quality over quantity",
    "Radical transparency",
    "Ship, learn, improve",
  ],
  approach: "async",
  timezone: "Worldwide 🌍",
};

Who we are

A boutique studio
with senior-level talent

Intercode is a tight-knit team of engineers, designers, and product thinkers who care deeply about the work we put our name on. We don't outsource, we don't cut corners, and we won't take on a project we can't do justice.

Whether you're a seed-stage startup validating an idea or a scale-up that needs a reliable engineering partner — we operate as a true extension of your team, not a vendor.

  • Senior engineers only — no juniors on client work
  • Direct communication, no account managers
  • Agile delivery with weekly progress updates
  • 100% remote & async-first
